# SolutionRunCompleted

> Emitted when a solution run completes successfully

**Channel:** redis
  
**Topic:** `solution-run-completed`

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| runId | string | yes | - |
| solutionId | string | yes | - |
| cost | number | yes | - |
| durationMs | number | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `afterCreate(SolutionRun)`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `updateSolutionMetrics`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
